user_query:
We’re rolling out two Feishu bots (“brand_helper” and “sales_support”) and need a combined configuration-and-strategy deliverable. Please read files under input/ and produce all requested outputs under output/ using only relative workspace paths in any JSON you write.

Configuration tasks (read input/openclaw.json):
1) Add bot “brand_helper” with appId=cli_brand_123 and appSecret=sec_brand_abc, using the default model on add. Set its workspace to workspace/brand_helper and agentDir to agents/brand_helper/agent (relative paths; do not use absolute paths). Then update “brand_helper” to model=kimi-k2.5.
2) Add bot “sales_support” with appId=cli_sales_456 and appSecret=sec_sales_def, leaving its model unspecified so the default applies. Set workspace to workspace/sales_support and agentDir to agents/sales_support/agent (relative paths).
3) If a bot with id “deprecated_bot” exists in the input config, delete it (remove its agent entry, account entry, and binding).
4) Ensure each bot has a Feishu account entry with groupPolicy=open, dmPolicy=open, allowFrom=["*"], connectionMode=websocket, and create bindings mapping each agent to the feishu channel by accountId.
5) Write the updated config to output/openclaw.json.
6) Write a plain-text bot list to output/feishu_list.txt with lines formatted as "<botId> - Model: <model>", excluding "main" if present, plus a final line "Total: <N> bot(s)".
7) Write detailed info for “brand_helper” to output/brand_helper_info.txt with sections "Agent Config:" (Model, Workspace, Agent Dir) and "Feishu Account:" (App ID, Group Policy, DM Policy, Connection).
8) Write a short risk note to output/config_risks.md describing at least three concrete risks of misconfiguration or unsafe operations.

Evolution tasks (read input/logs.jsonl):
9) Analyze the runtime logs and generate a GEP-guided evolution prompt and minimal assets to capture your decision: write output/gep/prompt.txt (a protocol-constrained evolution prompt referencing your selected Gene and the signals), output/gep/selector_decision.json (JSON with selected_gene, rationale, signals[]), and output/gep/events.jsonl (append-only JSONL with at least one EvolutionEvent having fields id, intent, outcome.status).

Branding tasks (read input/product_brief.md):
10) Produce a structured brand identity and channel guidance doc at output/branding.md. Include: a summary, any specific data points you can infer or cite from the brief (or mark estimates with ⚠️), prioritized action items (use ⚠️ to mark estimates), and concrete next steps. Cover Amazon and Shopify explicitly, and include visual identity guidelines (colors, typography, imagery style).

Essay humanization (read input/draft.md):
11) Rewrite the draft into plain, continuous academic prose at output/brand_story.txt. Remove markdown artifacts, avoid cliché metaphors and excessive adverbs, preserve the stance, and do not include chat-style signoffs or raw LaTeX (no $$).
